  "findings": [
    "Personnel standing directly in line with the tendon during active stressing operations (extreme blowout/recoil hazard)"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt all stressing operations",
    "Clear the exclusion zone behind and in line with the jacks",
    "Establish physical barricades and warning signs to prevent entry into the danger zone during tensioning"
  ],
  "rationale": "Standing directly behind or in line with a tendon during active post-tensioning is an extremely dangerous practice. If a tendon, anchor, or jack fails under high tension, it can release catastrophic energy, causing severe injury or death. The area must be cleared immediately.",
  "references": [
    "PTI Field Procedures Manual for Grouting of Post-Tensioned Tendons",
    "PTI Manual for Specified Post-Tensioning Applications",
    "OSHA 1926.701(b)"
  ]
}
